Hi Flavia. How often does the team meet?
We always meet on Monday to plan the week.
And do you usually work at the office?
I usually work at the office, but I often work from home too.
Who organizes the schedule and the deadlines?
That is my responsibility. I always organize the schedule.
Do you ever miss a deadline?
No, I never miss a deadline. I am always ready.
I usually work at the office on Wednesdays.
Each colleague has a task and a deadline.
I always organize the schedule, and I never miss a deadline.
We sometimes develop new ideas for small companies.

Hi Flavia, this is Bruno from the projects team. Here is the plan for the week. On Monday, we always meet at nine to organize the tasks. On Tuesday and Wednesday, the team usually works at the office. On Thursday, we often visit small companies in the region. On Friday, we sometimes review the results before the deadline. Please check your schedule and confirm the meeting. Thank you, and have a good week.

Good morning, everyone. This is a quick reminder about our weekly meeting. We always start on Monday at nine, so please be on time. Bring your task list and your deadlines for the week. Marina usually shares the schedule, and she is always ready to help. Remember, we never cancel the Monday meeting, because it is important to plan the week together. See you all soon, and thank you.

On Monday, the team always meets to plan the week. Each colleague gets a task and a deadline. During the week, they usually organize the projects together. On Wednesday, they often check the schedule and the progress. On Friday, they sometimes review the results before the deadline.
